title: [CS] Augmentations
body:
# [CS] Augmentations

This mod requires [CS] Library to function, and is a dependency.
The mod is in **BETA**, so expect bugs, and remember to back up your worlds.

## About the Mod

In [CS] Augmentations, we aim to add an efficient and rewarding mod that allows the player to engineer and surgically implant their own cybernetic augmentations. There are numerous components and stations to do so, as well as adding the element of fermenting your own beverages, as well as cooking up some lovely Pharmacuticals to share with your friends.

Please consider installing JEI to be able to access all of the crafting recipes for the mod.

### Regarding notable features:
- Refinery
- Cell Cultivator
- Fermentation
- Chemistry Table
- Natural Organs and Limbs
- Augmented Organs and Limbs
- Surgical Equipment
- Pharmacuticals and Beverages
  


Feel free to join and talk to us about BUGS AND ISSUES, or give suggestions on what to add next.
